summary: Phase 2A Testing Complete: XP/Leveling System, Road Reports, Community Badges - All features working. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: XP values correctly implemented: photo_report=500, offer_redemption=700, safe_drive=1000, consistent_driving=500, safety_penalty=-500
Level progression: Level 1→2=2500 XP, +500 per level, max level 99
Road Reports correctly award 500 XP on creation and 10 gems per upvote to reporter
Community Badges (20 total) display correctly with earned checkmarks and locked badges grayed out
No progress bars on community badges (as per requirements)
Trip completion with safety metrics correctly awards/penalizes XP based on driving behavior
test_credentials: No authentication required - uses mock data
seed_data_creation: Backend uses in-memory mock data with default user 123456
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2A complete. XP/Level system with levels 1-99, Road Reports with upvotes (10 gems each), Community Badges (20 total, 3 earned). All features integrated into Profile overview and Map tab.

GET /api/xp/status.response: Returns level, total_xp, xp_progress, xp_to_next_level, progress_percent, is_max_level

GET /api/xp/config.response: photo_report=500, offer_redemption=700, safe_drive=1000, consistent_driving=500, safety_penalty=-500, base_xp_to_level=2500, xp_increment=500, max_level=99

POST /api/xp/add.notes: Supports event_types: photo_report, offer_redemption, safe_drive, consistent_bonus, safety_penalty

GET /api/reports.response: Returns all road reports with upvotes, upvoters, type, title, description

POST /api/reports/{id}/upvote.notes: Awards 10 gems to reporter, prevents self-upvote and duplicate upvotes

GET /api/reports/my.response: Returns user's reports with stats (total_reports, total_upvotes, gems_from_upvotes)

GET /api/badges/community.response: Returns 20 community badges with earned status, no progress bars

POST /api/trips/complete-with-safety.notes: Awards XP based on safety metrics: safe_drive=1000, consistent_bonus=500 (every 3 safe drives), safety_penalty=-500

features: Stats bar: Reports count, Upvotes count, Gems Earned
Nearby Reports and My Reports tabs
Report cards with type icon, title, description, upvote button
Report type selection (Hazard, Accident, Construction, Police, Weather)
Gems info: +10 gems for each upvote
Level card showing Level 42, 519,200 XP total
How to Earn XP section with all XP values
Level Requirements section (Level 1→2: 2,500 XP, +500 XP per level, Max level: 99)
Warning about unsafe driving lowering XP
3 earned badges with green checkmarks (First Report, Helpful Driver, Road Guardian)
Badge detail modal with earned/locked status

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - Backend uses in-memory mock data. No database connected.
